fields.label: Desk access
fields.rationale: Almost every business role needs Desk. Set to 0 only for portal-only personas (Customer, Supplier style) that never log into Desk.

fields.label: Require 2FA
fields.rationale: Default off for V1. Flip on only when the user explicitly requests heightened security for this role.

fields.label: Permission level
fields.rationale: Permlevel 0 covers the whole document. Higher permlevels require the target DocType to define field-level permlevels; V1 defaults to 0 unless the prompt names a specific level.

fields.label: Action flags (read/write/create/delete/submit/cancel/amend/print/email/export/report/share)
fields.rationale: Default grants read+write+create+delete+print+email+export+report+share. Leave submit/cancel/amend at 0 unless the target DocType is submittable and the role should approve. Never grant write=1 with read=0 (Frappe requires read for write to take effect).
